project_info.title: My Handmade Toy — Day Three: The Big Adventure

outline.title: My Handmade Toy — Day Three: The Big Adventure
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: OU Sound: -ou- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ou- words: house, mouse, cloud, count. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: OW Sound: -ow- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ow- words (as in out): cow, owl, brown, clown. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Long OO: -oo- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for long -oo- words: moon, pool, spoon, zoo. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Short OO: -oo- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for short -oo- words: book, cook, wood, foot. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Can You Read These Words? Phonics Review!
outline.summary: Phonics review game slide with all 16 words from today's phonics lesson for students to practice reading.
